heading: Number in service in time of peace
label: 8663 Number in service in time of peace
text: In time of peace, the President may keep in service such vessels of the Navy as are required and keep the rest in reserve.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7293.34 U.S.C. 452R.S. 1534.The words “vessels of the Navy” are substituted for the words “of the public armed vessels”. The words “actual”, “in his opinion”, and “by the nature of the service” are omitted as surplusage. The words “in reserve” are substituted for the words “to be laid up in ordinary in convenient ports” to conform to modern terminology.
